ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 2XS, XS, S) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent (if applicable) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand this size belongs to */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size equivalent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size this measurement belongs to */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "bust_in" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_in" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_in" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "brand_type" TEXT /* Type of brand (e.g., luxury, casual, sports) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand this product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product (e.g., t-shirts, jeans, skirts) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "available_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Customer's timezone */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "customer_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer this size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Customer's bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_in" TEXT /* Customer's bust measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Customer's inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Customer's inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Customer's sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_in" TEXT /* Customer's sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" TEXT /* Customer's shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_in" TEXT /* Customer's shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address to which the invoice will be sent */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
